defect: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it
prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Trench protection, part of the Sitework & Utilities scope. The observed field condition is: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1926 Subpart P.
title: Hazard check: Trench protection (residential job)
